title: History | Global Immigration Compliance | Houston, TX | Foster LLP
content:
## Personalized Global I mmigration S ervices for B usinesses , F amilies , and I ndividuals S ince 1973
Foster LLP is a leading global immigration law firm dedicated to helping employers and individuals obtain nonimmigrant and immigrant work visas and permanent resident options worldwide. With the most board-certified attorneys in immigration and nationality law in Texas, we guarantee top-tier knowledge and expertise, a client-centered approach to service excellence, and tech-led solutions to strategically manage today’s growing need for international talent.
For 50 years, Foster continues to champion each client’s goals and objectives, by providing the highest-quality, value-added immigration solutions in an environment which promotes excellence, integrity, service, and community. Our firm comprises over 100 lawyers, legal assistants, and other professionals with principal offices located in Dallas, Austin , and Houston , TX, in addition to multiple global coordination centers.
Named a Tier 1 “Best Law Firm”​ by US News & World Report and Best Lawyers®, our immigration lawyers are recognized as respected thought leaders in the corporate immigration field by Chambers, Texas Super Lawyers, Best Lawyers, and Who’s Who. Wherever your business takes you – in the U.S. or abroad – your Foster team reaches to deliver full immigration support.
Foster’s mission is to champion each client’s goals and objectives by providing the highest-quality, value-added immigration solutions in an environment which promotes excellence, integrity, service, and community.
- Excellence. We develop innovative and thought-leading solutions. We are at the forefront of the legal issues in our field, and we foster a workplace that rewards achievement within our firm, our profession, and our communities.
- Integrity. We are trustworthy. We exhibit personal and professional integrity by demonstrating honesty, respect, empathy, and reliability in our relationships with clients, coworkers, and our community.
- Service. We are responsive and proactive. We deliver value-added, client-oriented service that anticipates and meets evolving client needs. We partner with each other to serve our clients, communities, and those in need.
- Community. We promote and honor community service and leadership. We also strive to maintain a sense of community and belonging in our workplace, where employees work together as a team and all are appreciated for the crucial roles they play in serving our clients.
To learn more about the many U.S. and global immigration services our law firm provides, contact us today to request a consultation.
